content:
D.A.P.A.U.E. EMPLOYEE HANDBOOK (2025 Edition)

WELCOME TO THE TEAM.

Your role as Data Entry Clerk is vital to the seamless operation of the Department of Artificial Physiology & Advanced User Enhancement.

KEY POLICIES:
1. Canteen Usage: Currently closed for biological decontamination. Please use Level 1 vending.
2. Bionics Etiquette: Do not stare at trial participants. Mechanical hitches are part of the calibration process.
3. Data Hygiene: 'Scrubbing' is a mandatory daily process. If a file is flagged 'Legacy Error', delete it. Do not archive it.

Signed,
Kara (HR)
name: Employee_Handbook_v9.pdf

content:
SECURITY PROTOCOL 4: DATA SOVEREIGNTY

REMINDER FOR ARCHIVE STAFF:

Any data relating to 'Class-A' or 'Class-B' assets is classified. 

DEFINITIONS:
- CLASS-C: External Limb Replacement (Public Knowledge)
- CLASS-B: Internal Organ Augmentation (Protected Health Info)
- CLASS-A: Neural Mapping & Consciousness Drivers (EXECUTIVE EYES ONLY)

Penalties for unauthorized decryption include immediate termination and legal action under the State Secrets Act.
name: Security_Briefing_Sec4.txt

content:
OBSERVATION LOG - 4TH STREET BUS STOP

Theory: It's a Collection Node. 

Date: Jan 20, 2026
17:04 - Subject (Green Jacket, leg brace) stops walking. Stares blankly.
17:08 - Subject shakes head, boards bus immediately. Duration: 4m 00s.

Date: Jan 21, 2026
08:50 - Three subjects waiting. All three freeze simultaneously.
08:54 - All three move simultaneously. Duration: 4m 00s.

It's a data burst. They are uploading the maps via the local wifi node disguised as a billboard.
name: bus_stop_timings.txt

content:

content:
Sarah,

I know you're probably not reading this. I know they told you it was just a check-up. 

I found your file. They aren't trying to fix the limp. They are mapping the way your brain compensates for it so they can put that code into the androids. You're just training data to them.

Run.

- A Friend.
name: Warning_Letter_Draft.txt

content:
TECHNICAL BULLETIN: Co-Pilot v4.2 Patch Notes

Fixes:
- Smoothed out 'tremors' caused by user resistance to AI pathfinding.
- Increased 'Nudge' authority: AI can now override micro-movements to prevent falls.

Known Issues:
- 'Ghost Limbs': Users report feeling pain in limbs that were replaced years ago. This is a software desync. 
- Workaround: Increase dosage of Suppressant-B. Do not admit software fault.
name: CoPilot_Patch_Notes_v4.2.txt

content:
AUDIO TRANSCRIPT - BREAK ROOM (Auto-Generated)

Speaker A (Unknown): ...did you see the enzyme levels on the new intake?
Speaker B (M_ROBINSON): Yeah. It's the rejection loop. The body knows the metal isn't supposed to be there.
Speaker A: But the report says 'flu symptoms.'
Speaker B: Look, do you want to keep your pension? It's the flu. It's always the flu. If they die, it's 'complications from pneumonia.' Just update the spreadsheet.

[End of Transcript - Keyword 'PENSION' flagged for review]
name: AutoLog_Mic_BreakRoom2.txt
